mentions.note: Senior housing REIT led by legendary Deb Cafaro. Up 2,100% since 2000 (9,200% total return with dividends); +112% past 3 years. 80,000 units across portfolio. Trading 30x prior-year FFO, 26x 2026 est. 2.5% yield (highest of three). 'Danced with one who brought you'—best historical return, cheapest valuation, best yield. Cramer's top pick in sector.
Baby boomers turn 80 starting 2026; 70M population, 87% occupancy, multi-year NOI growth; 900 communities, consolidator in fragmented market; 19% CAGR since 2000.
